content:
If your looking for simple navigation guidance.

  1. Press the menu button (top left of screen).
  2. Press the down arrow to show available accounts
  3. Tap an account.
  4. Tap inbox from the folder list to open it.

If inbox in not visible, you may have hidden it. To make it visible again ...

  1. Press the menu button (top left of screen).
  2. Press the down arrow to show available accounts
  3. Tap an account.
  4. Tap manage folders (bottom of list)
  5. Tap "Inbox"
  6. Toggle "Show Folder" ON
